data.title: AI is helping UK airports manage disruption as passenger numbers rise, with major hubs like Heathrow operating close to pre-pandemic levels.
data.description: In LUTON, England, Artificial intelligence is becoming more integral in the management of disruptions at UK airports due to the escalating number of passengers. According to Civil Aviation Authority (CAA) figures, prominent airports such as Heathrow, Gatwick, and Luton are operating at levels similar to before the pandemic, intensifying the demand for effective flight scheduling and ground transportation. Analysts in the industry note that AI is now commonly employed to forecast delays, monitor incoming flights, and organize connecting flights, especially...

data.title: Green Circle Decarbonize Technology Limited prices $10,000,000 IPO, offering 2,500,000 shares at $4.00 each on NYSE American.
data.description: On Jan. 12, 2026, Green Circle Decarbonize Technology Limited revealed the pricing details of its initial public offering (IPO), offering 2,500,000 ordinary shares at a price of $4.00 per share. The company, which operates through its Hong Kong entity, specializes in developing and producing Phase Change Material (PCM-TES) storage systems for cooling and heating applications. The IPO is being facilitated by the Cayman Islands-based holding company, with shares scheduled to trade on the NYSE American Market starting Jan. 13, 2026, under the ticker symbol “GCDT.”

data.title: Oak Valley Bancorp promotes Bill Nunes to Executive VP, CMO, and Jose Sabala to Senior VP, CRA Officer.
data.description: On January 12, 2026, Oakdale-based Oak Valley Bancorp (NASDAQ: OVLY) disclosed the promotions within its organization. Bill Nunes has been elevated to the role of Executive Vice President and Chief Marketing Officer while Jose Sabala has been named as the Senior Vice President dealing with the Community Reinvestment Act (CRA) policies. Oak Valley Bancorp operates as the bank holding entity for Oak Valley Community Bank and its Eastern Sierra Community Bank sector.

data.title: VanEck CEO sees crypto as Q1 2026 risk-on play among others like AI & gold with fiscal clarity rising.
data.description: In the first quarter of 2026, Jan van Eck's outlook highlights cryptocurrency, artificial intelligence (AI), and gold as promising investment options. As fiscal and monetary transparency continue to enhance, these sectors are seen as attractive opportunities.

data.title: Rocket Doctor AI Inc. grants 75,000 stock options ($0.74/share) and 212,148 RSUs to consultants, valid for 3 years.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on January 12, 2026, Rocket Doctor AI Inc. (CSE: AIDR, OTC: AIRDF, Frankfurt: 939) revealed that they have provided a total of 75,000 stock options, which can be exercised at $0.74 per share, valid for three years, and 212,148 restricted share units, valid for a three-year term, to consultants of the company. These stock options and restricted share units are part of the company's share compensation plans and will vest over a one-year period.
